title: Logo Refinement for Print
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (existing AI-generated raster logo) -> image_vectorize (clean sharp vector edges) -> document_render_vector (AI/EPS + high-res PNG for print)
original_brief: Enhance an existing logo created on ChatGPT. Love the design but need it made professional. Improve resolution for printing, make edges sharper, enhance colour accuracy. Ideal skills: vector software (AI, EPS), eye for colour, logo refinement.

client_persona.industry: Artisanal loose-leaf tea blending and sales
client_persona.voice: Our brand voice is comforting and knowledgeable, like a friendly guide sharing a cherished recipe. We aim to evoke a sense of quiet ritual and natural goodness.

generator.prompt:
Flat graphic logo for "Emberleaf Teas" — Artisanal loose-leaf tea blending and sales. The logo should feature a simplified, flat emblem of a stylized tea leaf or a small tea plant, paired with 'Emberleaf Teas' as a clear, elegant wordmark. It should use 3-4 flat colors from the palette, avoiding gradients for clean vectorization.
Wordmark text reading EXACTLY "Emberleaf Teas" beneath a simple flat emblem.
Colors strictly limited to: #4A5F4B, #C77C5F, #F5EFE6. Plain white background, centered composition,
3-5 flat solid colors, crisp shapes, no gradients, no shadows, no photo elements, no extra
text besides the brand name. Style: the slightly-soft look of an AI chatbot-generated logo.

assets.input_requirement: Intended brand colours / target hex for colour-accuracy fix — confirm

generator.prompt:
Output the brand color spec for Emberleaf Teas as JSON:
{"brand": "Emberleaf Teas", "colors": [{"name": "...", "hex": "...", "usage": "emblem|wordmark|background"}],
"notes": "exact hexes the vector output must match after tracing"}.
Use exactly these palette colors: #4A5F4B (Ember Green), #C77C5F (Terracotta Blush), #F5EFE6 (Cream Brew).

decisions.requirement: Intended brand colours / target hex for colour-accuracy fix — confirm
decisions.assumed_value: Assumed = the persona palette, written to brand_colors.json
decisions.why: Brief says 'confirm'; we fixed the hexes so the Adobe agent has a concrete target.

decisions.requirement: Output: vector AI/EPS, print-resolution, sharp edges
decisions.assumed_value: OUTPUT spec for the Adobe agent: image_vectorize -> document_render_vector to AI/EPS + high-res PNG
decisions.why: Describes the deliverable, not an input.

decisions.assumed_value: Simulated: generated flat logo deliberately degraded (downscale + JPEG roundtrip) to mimic a soft chatbot-exported raster
decisions.why: Gives image_vectorize a genuinely imperfect raster to clean up — same starting point as the real client's file.
